posts.author: Singrauli
posts.text: All Eyes on Wall Street Today — Big day for markets. Fed Rate Decision (2:00 PM) ET All eyes on policy shift. Rate stance will set short-term trend. Powell’s Final Presser (2:30 PM) ET Jerome Powell didn’t come from a typical economist background he started in investment and finance, not academics. Still, he went on to lead the Federal Reserve during some of the toughest times COVID crash, money printing, and then aggressive rate hikes to control inflation.He’s always been calm and straightforward no big drama, but markets still react to every word he says. As he signs off, it’s more like a st…
